summary: Customers are generally satisfied with the products but have feedback on lifestyle images, garment preferences, and aesthetic adjustments. Improving these areas can enhance customer engagement and brand satisfaction.

lifestyle_image_improvements.issue: More consistent rendering of patterns and garments in lifestyle images
Better representation of product features, such as hands coming out of aprons

garment_priorities.reason: Customers want to see more tank tops with black trim and men's options
Customers appreciate the versatility of leggings but suggest adjusting sizing for a better fit

aesthetic_adjustments.adjustment: Black trim or grid instead of white for added depth and contrast
aesthetic_adjustments.details: Consider using these elements to enhance visual interest in product images

aesthetic_adjustments.adjustment: Pattern suggestions, such as the one from 69a8fb3dd434b5c0fe0d412c
aesthetic_adjustments.details: Incorporate these patterns to add variety and visual appeal to products

popular_products.recommendation: Transpose this product to new templates for improved lifestyle image rendering
Adjust the pattern interpretation for better consistency across all products
